note: seq=124: LIFELINE hardening 1/N. The 16GB box had ZERO swap -- the enabler of today's OOM that killed Postgres for 6h. Add an 8G swapfile (idempotent: skips if swap exists) + vm.swappiness=10 so memory pressure spills to swap instead of OOM-killing PG. Self-contained (write_file + /opt/atlas python), no external fetch.

steps.note: seq=124: add swap headroom (root-cause fix for the PG OOM outage).
